overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's neon-lit downtown district. The player character ascends from a subway stairwell into a bustling plaza, navigates through covered walkways and rain-slicked streets with futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and encounters sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

events.description: ascends stairs and emerges from enclosed stairwell into open plaza

wide concrete stairs leading upward
futuristic building with blue facade and circular orange lights

large digital billboard displaying advertisements above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of a concrete stairwell illuminated by vibrant pink neon rails. The camera ascends the stairs, transitioning from the enclosed underground space into an open urban plaza with a distinctive blue art-deco building visible ahead.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an open plaza featuring a parked NCPD police vehicle and scattered pedestrians. The environment features prominent neon signage including a BIG SHOT advertisement, while the camera navigates around a large concrete planter in the center of the walkway.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a darker, covered pedestrian walkway characterized by teal structural walls and overhead cover. A pedestrian in white stands in the path ahead as the camera moves through this transitional space between the plaza and the street.

black metal railings separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto a city street with wet asphalt reflecting the vibrant neon lights. A yellow streamline-moderne building stands across the street while vehicles drive past on the rain-slicked road, and the camera walks along the sidewalk protected by metal railings.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered pedestrian corridor illuminated by striking purple neon columns on the left. The walkway features metal safety railings along the street side and scattered urban debris, with a few pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: major commercial intersection with massive holographic advertisements

waits at crosswalk as vehicles pass, then begins crossing the street

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into a major commercial intersection dominated by a massive building covered in holographic billboards and digital advertisements. The player approaches a crosswalk, waits for passing vehicles including a black sedan, and begins crossing toward the towering commercial structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a neon-lit underground stairwell into the rain-slicked vibrancy of a futuristic city street. It begins at the bottom of a concrete stairwell illuminated by pink neon rails, climbing upward to transition from the enclosed subterranean space into an open urban plaza dominated by a blue art-deco building. As the camera navigates the plaza, it passes a parked NCPD vehicle and a large concrete planter under the glow of a BIG SHOT advertisement before shifting into a darker, covered pedestrian walkway with teal structural walls. The scene then opens as the camera emerges from the overhead cover onto a city street, where the lighting shifts to reflections on wet asphalt. Finally, the camera moves along a sidewalk protected by metal railings, passing a yellow streamline-moderne building as vehicles drive through the rain.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit pedestrian corridor into the expansive scale of a bustling commercial intersection. It begins within a covered walkway, gliding past striking purple neon columns and metal safety railings amidst scattered urban debris. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space opens up, emerging from the shelter of the corridor into the open air of a major city crossing. The scene then expands to reveal a massive building draped in towering holographic billboards and digital advertisements, while the camera pauses for a passing black sedan before crossing the street toward the glowing structure.
